rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: WMI Suspicious Commands (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: WMI Suspicious Commands (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: fd4852d8-3464-4639-acc5-f9cf9553a396
status: experimental
description: Detects the wmic process with suspicious options. Part of the RedCanary
  2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wmic.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - create
    - 'node:'
    - process
    - call
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Likely will require tuning based on organizational context.
level: low
